name: Tsubasa Evo-1 (ツバエボ1)
description: This is our refined and improved original Tsubasa. Tsubasa Evo-1 is the ultimate lightweight dogi for ultra-fast, ultra-mobile kumite action. Using the latest technology, we have woven the 100% polyester material with a diamond-shaped texture on the inside surface (instead of dots found on the original Tsubasa) to reduce friction even further and assist with gliding over the body.

name: Tsubasa (ツバサ)
description: An ultra-lightweight material that surpasses conventional standards! A special weaving method creates an uneven inner texture, reducing friction and preventing the fabric from sticking to the skin. Additionally, the material provides approximately 5% stretch, increasing ease of movement.

name: Kū (クウ)
description: It's ultra-lightweight, even lighter than the Pinac. It's thin yet still feels super soft. Very compact, making it easy to carry around.

name: Pinac Kumite (ピナック組手用)
description: This best-selling karate uniform is the core of all Hirota products. It was a groundbreaking product that made a splash in an era when there was no distinction between karate uniforms for kata and kumite. In this day and age when lighter karate uniforms are being developed, it may not be specifically designed for kumite, but it is lightweight and easy to move in, making it an all-purpose garment that can be used for extreme fighting. It is a favorite of many traditional athletes and instructors.

name: Takumi (タクミ)
description: This fabric is made by densely packing the threads used in Pinac Kumite, woven to the utmost limit to create a firm, crisp finish. Thin yet structured, easy to move in, and has exceptional snap. It is currently one of the most popular garments, loved by everyone from children to top athletes.

name: Pinac Kata (ピナック形用)
description: The is a medium-weight fabric, made with a thicker thread than the one used for Pinac Kumite. It is neither too light nor too heavy, making it a stable and versatile garment.

name: MH-10
description: This karate uniform is made of thick No. 10 canvas (woven with high-quality combed yarn). The thickness of the fabric makes it ideal for kata. It is also recommended for those who find light or medium-weight fabrics insufficient.

name: MH-11
description: This is a medium-weight karate uniform made from No. 11 canvas (woven with high-quality combed yarn). Because the fabric is medium-weight, it can be used for both kata and kumite. This is a standard fabric among ready-made products.
